summary: We recommend bundling the D5 done-flip with the D6 ship in a single tick because both touch the outcomes spec repo and both are paired in ADR 0001 as the asymmetric checks the matrix currently cannot exercise. The tradeoff against landing D6 in a separate tick is the same as B3 plus B4 in tick 6 the bookkeeping is cleaner when paired but the D6 PR opensubagents outcomes 12 is independent and auto-merge-armed so this tick is not load-bearing. D5 row flips to done because opensubagents outcomes pull 11 merged at 07 09 Z and D6 ships in opensubagents outcomes pull 12 with the --check-urls flag off by default to keep the HeuristicVerifier pure and only the CLI layer doing network requests.

claims.statement: QUEUE row D5 flipped from in_progress to done because opensubagents outcomes pull 11 merged at 07 09 14 Z landing the citation staleness downgrade in both reference SDKs and the spec doc with the merged-PR URL preserved as the runroc.

citations.title: outcomes pull 11 merged at 07 09 Z lands the staleness downgrade
QUEUE md D5 row updated to done with the cross-repo PR URL

claims.caveats: If the staleness threshold ever needs adjustment that is a follow-up PR not a D5 revival.

claims.statement: opensubagents outcomes pull 12 opened with auto-merge armed adds --check-urls as an opt-in argparse flag on the verify subcommand and threads it into _verify which calls _apply_url_liveness only when the flag is set so HeuristicVerifier verify itself remains pure per Section 2.1.2.

citations.title: spec section 02 verifier requires the verifier be pure with respect to inputs

claims.caveats: Transport errors URLError TimeoutError ConnectionError are intentionally ignored so a flaky network does not silently break the gate; only true 4xx 5xx responses trigger the downgrade.

claims.statement: two new pytest tests pass alongside the existing 27 covering 29 total because test_check_urls_downgrades_on_broken monkeypatches _head_check to return 404 and asserts the CLI still exits 0 while test_check_urls_off_by_default asserts _head_check is never called without the flag.

citations.title: sdk-python test_cli py with the two new --check-urls tests
python-sdk workflow that runs the test suite on every PR

claims.caveats: TS-side CLI does not exist so D6 has no TypeScript analogue; this matches the existing CLI-only pattern of outcome-gate yml.

open_questions: Should ADR 0002 supersede ADR 0001 to record that D5 and D6 are the asymmetric checks ADR 0001 was waiting on and that B5 ratchet is now safe to merge?
methodology_notes: Re-read sdk-python cli py to find the right insertion points for the flag and the URL liveness pass; wrote _head_check and _apply_url_liveness as pure helpers so the CLI is the only place that touches the network; verified the off-by-default invariant via a monkeypatched counter test.
